feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman reached the Rocket Hideout elevator beneath Celadon.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red is guarding the elevator line so Antman can work the panel without a Rocket ambush.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill decoded a Nexus Order elevator override hidden under Rocket's wiring.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Rocket elevator panel has been restored with the Lift Key.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: A Gold Dust ledger points toward Giovanni's command floor.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight left a sleep signal inside the elevator shaft.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Giovanni's command floor route has been found.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Rocket command floor is unlocked for the next Celadon push.
